No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly provides technical and vocational skills (App development, software use) and offers certification, strongly aligning with Target 4.4 for employment and entrepreneurship.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course enhances employability by providing practical software and app development skills, directly supporting technological upgrading and decent job creation (Targets 8.2, 8.3, 8.5).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍) provides a minor, inferred link to promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3).
